mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, name, phone, household_id AS householdId, status FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO household_history (household_id, user_id, status, changed_at) VALUES (#{householdId}, #{userId}, '입주', NOW())
